creator: misho@aitbg.com
text:
ipsec-tools is broken in current. This patch files fix Makefile of port dir and fix isakmp_cfg source file. Change login and logout functions and remove ut structure.

Fix: patch < ipsec-tools_fbsd90.patch

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/security/ipsec-tools; make install
